metadata.name: Respond to a Guest Medical Emergency

description: A guest calls the front desk reporting a medical emergency (e.g., chest pains).

nodes.task_description: Immediately call emergency medical services (911/ambulance) and provide the hotel address and guest's room number.
Keep the guest on the line to offer reassurance until help arrives, if possible.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent provides a calming presence.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch hotel security to the guest's room to provide immediate assistance and to guide the paramedics when they arrive.

expected_outcome.expected: Security is sent to the room and the hotel entrance.
